SEARCH
Package order

Class Cart

java.lang.Object
order.Cart
public class Cart extends Object
Cart, array of products and packs the user has not paid yet
Version:
1.2
Author:
Sofía C.L. and Ana O.R.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Cart()
    Creates a cart with default modification date (today)
    Cart(boolean assignedExpired, LocalDate assignedModificationDate)
    Creates a new cart without content
    Cart(List<StoreProduct> assignedProducts, List<Pack> assignedPacks, boolean assignedExpired, LocalDate assignedModificationDate)
    Creates a new cart

  • Constructor Details

    • Cart

      public Cart(List<StoreProduct> assignedProducts, List<Pack> assignedPacks, boolean assignedExpired, LocalDate assignedModificationDate)
      Creates a new cart
      Parameters:
      assignedProducts - , the store products
      assignedPacks - , the packs
      assignedExpired - , whether it's expired
      assignedModificationDate - , the last modification date

    • Cart

      public Cart(boolean assignedExpired, LocalDate assignedModificationDate)
      Creates a new cart without content
      Parameters:
      assignedExpired - , whether it's expired
      assignedModificationDate - , the last modification date
